article_title: B.C. Reg. 242/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: Railway and Pipeline Property Tax Values Updated for 2026 in British Columbia
briefs.summary: BC's Assessment Authority has updated the dollar-per-kilometre values used to calculate the assessed value (the official dollar figure used to determine property taxes) of railway tracks and pipelines in British Columbia for 2026. The new rates replace the 2025 figures across all 11 track classes and update the pipeline valuation schedules.
briefs.action_required: If you own or operate railway or pipeline infrastructure in BC, review the new 2026 assessed values to anticipate property tax changes.

key_dates.label: BC Railway and Pipeline Corporations Valuation Regulation 2026 rates take effect
